languages.original_text: "Defeat? You have deprived me of an insignificant branch of my Museion. Your 'victory' is only that you managed to keep my attention on you for too long."

languages.text: "Поражение? Ты лишил{mf||а} меня малозначительного филиала моего Музеона. Твоя "победа" заключается лишь в том, что ты слишком долго удерживал{mf||а} на себе мой фокус внимания".
"Defeat? You have deprived me of an insignificant branch of my Museion. Your 'victory' is only that you managed to keep my attention on you for too long."
languages.original_text: "Поражение? Ты лишил{mf||а} меня малозначительного филиала моего Музеона. Твоя "победа" заключается лишь в том, что ты слишком долго удерживал{mf||а} на себе мой фокус внимания".

traits.locale_text: "Defeat? You have deprived me of an insignificant branch of my Museion. Your 'victory' is only that you managed to keep my attention on you for too long."
"Defeat? You have deprived me of an insignificant branch of my Museion. Your 'victory' is only that you managed to keep my attention on you for too long."
"Defeat? You have deprived me of an insignificant branch of my Museion. Your 'victory' is only that you managed to keep my attention on you for too long."

languages.text: «¿Derrota? Me has privado de una porción insignificante de mi Museion. Tu única "victoria" ha consistido en llamar mi atención más tiempo del que mereces».
languages.original_text: "Defeat? You have deprived me of an insignificant branch of my Museion. Your 'victory' is only that you managed to keep my attention on you for too long."

traits.locale_text: «¿Derrota? Me has privado de una porción insignificante de mi Museion. Tu única "victoria" ha consistido en llamar mi atención más tiempo del que mereces».

languages.text: “失败？你只是毁掉了我陈列馆里一个微不足道的分支。你那所谓的‘胜利’，不过是成功让我在你身上浪费了太多时间。”
languages.original_text: "Defeat? You have deprived me of an insignificant branch of my Museion. Your 'victory' is only that you managed to keep my attention on you for too long."

traits.locale_text: “失败？你只是毁掉了我陈列馆里一个微不足道的分支。你那所谓的‘胜利’，不过是成功让我在你身上浪费了太多时间。”

languages.text: « Vaincu ? Tout ce que j'ai perdu, c'est une branche insignifiante de mon Muséion. Votre seule "victoire" est d'avoir réussi à retenir mon attention pendant bien trop longtemps. »
languages.original_text: "Defeat? You have deprived me of an insignificant branch of my Museion. Your 'victory' is only that you managed to keep my attention on you for too long."

traits.locale_text: « Vaincu ? Tout ce que j'ai perdu, c'est une branche insignifiante de mon Muséion. Votre seule "victoire" est d'avoir réussi à retenir mon attention pendant bien trop longtemps. »

languages.text: "Yenilgi mi? Beni Museion'umun önemsiz bir dalından mahrum bıraktın. Zaferin, dikkatimi üzerinde çok uzun süre tutmayı başarmandan ibaret."
languages.original_text: "Defeat? You have deprived me of an insignificant branch of my Museion. Your 'victory' is only that you managed to keep my attention on you for too long."

traits.locale_text: "Yenilgi mi? Beni Museion'umun önemsiz bir dalından mahrum bıraktın. Zaferin, dikkatimi üzerinde çok uzun süre tutmayı başarmandan ibaret."

languages.text: "Niederlage? Du hast mich um einen unbedeutenden Teil meines Museions gebracht. Dein 'Sieg' besteht allein darin, dass ich dir zu lange meine Aufmerksamkeit gewidmet habe."
languages.original_text: "Defeat? You have deprived me of an insignificant branch of my Museion. Your 'victory' is only that you managed to keep my attention on you for too long."

traits.locale_text: "Niederlage? Du hast mich um einen unbedeutenden Teil meines Museions gebracht. Dein 'Sieg' besteht allein darin, dass ich dir zu lange meine Aufmerksamkeit gewidmet habe."

languages.text: 「敗北？あなたは私のムゼイオンの一枝を奪ったに過ぎません。あなたの『勝利』は、私の注意をあなたに長すぎる時間まで向けさせたことだけでしょう。」
languages.original_text: "Defeat? You have deprived me of an insignificant branch of my Museion. Your 'victory' is only that you managed to keep my attention on you for too long."

traits.locale_text: 「敗北？あなたは私のムゼイオンの一枝を奪ったに過ぎません。あなたの『勝利』は、私の注意をあなたに長すぎる時間まで向けさせたことだけでしょう。」
